name: automation-exempt
comment: Scope: this ruleset narrowly exempts the release-bot GitHub App (actor_id to be filled in post-install per /infrastructure/iam/release-bot-installation-README.md) from the PR review requirement ONLY for merges that have already passed all main-quality required status checks. It does NOT bypass non_fast_forward, deletion, required_linear_history, or required_status_checks — those remain enforced by main-quality. ENC-FTR-090 AC-4.
